feedback.text: Dear EU lawmakers, I would like to request that you to include protections to stop publishers from disabling games I've legally purchased. These games are sold without expiration, yet are made unplayable when support ends, which is a practice that feels unfair and violates the rights of owners. All I ask is that companies be required to provide an offline patch or fix so I can keep playing without needing their continued support. My request is in support of the Stop Killing Games initiative and their citizens' initiative "Stop Destroying Videogames." Thank you.
